subject: Re: FW: email from Alex to Jeffrey
body:
I wrote back the same day I received it.  PLease send
me the amount of money that you claim to have lost as
a result of igor now working for me..  this translates
into how much money did igor pay you last year... I
have repeatedly asked for you to show me,, and you
have been unwilling... I am surprised however that you
won't even tell me the amount that you claim he paid
you.. I respect your talent .
